mapper.select:
/** UsptBsnsPlanDocDao.selectBsnsPlanDocCnt */ select count(1) from ( select ub.bsns_nm /*사업명*/ , ub.bsns_year /*사업년도*/ , ub.cnsrtm /*컨소시엄여부*/ , ubpa.receipt_no /*접수번호*/ , ubp.pblanc_nm /*공고명*/ , case when ubpd.task_nm_ko is null then ubpat.task_nm_ko else ubpd.task_nm_ko end as task_nm_ko /*과제명*/ , ubpd.presentn_dt /*제출일시*/ , to_char(ubpd.presentn_dt ,'yyyymmdd') as presentn_dy /*제출일*/ , case when utr.rspnber_nm is null then ubpat.rspnber_nm else utr.rspnber_nm end as rspnber_nm /*책임자명_회원명*/ , ubpd.plan_presentn_sttus_cd /*제출상태*/ , case when ubpd.plan_presentn_sttus_cd is null then '미제출' else fn_cmm_get_code_nm('PLAN_PRESENTN_STTUS', ubpd.plan_presentn_sttus_cd) end as plan_presentn_sttus_nm /*제출상태명*/ , ubpd.bsns_plan_doc_id /*사업계획서ID*/ , ubpd.prsentr_attachment_group_id /*제출첨부파일그룹ID*/ , ubpd.bsns_slctn_ID /** 사업선정대상ID */ , ubpat.apply_id /*신청ID*/ , (select member_nm from cmmt_member where member_id = ubpd.member_id) as member_nm /*회원명 */ from uspt_bsns ub /**사업*/ inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp /**사업공고*/ on ub.bsns_cd = ubp.bsns_cd /*사업코드*/ and ubp.enabled = true inner join uspt_bsns_job_step ubjs /*사업업무단계*/ on ubp.bsns_cd = ubjs.bsns_cd /*사업코드*/ and ubjs.job_step_cd ='AGREM' /*업무단계_협약*/ inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa /**사업공고신청자*/ on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpa.pblanc_id /*공공id*/ inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_apply_task ubpat /**사업공고 신청 과제*/ on ubpa.apply_id = ubpat.apply_id inner join uspt_last_slctn_trget ulst /**최종선정대상*/ on ubpa.apply_id = ulst.apply_id /*신청ID*/ and ulst.slctn = true inner join uspt_bsns_slctn ubs /**사업선정대상*/ on ulst.last_slctn_trget_id = ubs.last_slctn_trget_id /*최종선정대상ID*/ left outer join uspt_bsns_plan_doc ubpd /**사업계획서*/ on ubs.bsns_slctn_id = ubpd.bsns_slctn_id /*사업선정대상ID*/ left outer join uspt_task_rspnber utr /**과제책임자*/ on ubpd.bsns_plan_doc_id = utr.bsns_plan_doc_ID /*사업계획서ID*/ where 1=1
and ubpd.presentn_dt between to_date(#{presentnDtStart},'yyyymmdd') and to_date(#{presentnDtEnd},'yyyymmdd')
and ub.bsns_year = #{bsnsYear} /*사업년도*/
and ub.bsns_nm like concat('%', #{bsnsNm}, '%') /*사업명*/
and ubp.pblanc_nm like concat('%', #{pblancNm}, '%') /*공고명*/
and ubpd.bsns_plan_doc_id = #{bsnsPlanDocId} /*사업계획서ID*/
and ubpd.bsns_slctn_id = #{bsnsSlctnId} /** 사업선정대상ID */
) a where 1=1
and a.task_nm_ko like concat('%', #{taskNmKo}, '%') /*과제명*/
and a.member_nm like concat('%', #{memberNm}, '%') /*회원명*/
and (a.plan_presentn_sttus_cd ='PLPR01' or a.plan_presentn_sttus_cd is null)
and a.plan_presentn_sttus_cd = #{planPresentnSttusCd} /*제출상태*/

/** UsptBsnsPlanDocDao.selectBsnsPlanDocList */ select a.* , row_number() over (order by a.receipt_no desc) as rn from ( select ub.bsns_nm /*사업명*/ , ub.bsns_year /*사업년도*/ , ub.cnsrtm /*컨소시엄여부*/ , ubpa.receipt_no /*접수번호*/ , ubp.pblanc_nm /*공고명*/ , case when ubpd.task_nm_ko is null then ubpat.task_nm_ko else ubpd.task_nm_ko end as task_nm_ko /*과제명*/ , ubpd.presentn_dt /*제출일시*/ , to_char(ubpd.presentn_dt ,'yyyymmdd') as presentn_dy /*제출일*/ , case when utr.rspnber_nm is null then ubpat.rspnber_nm else utr.rspnber_nm end as rspnber_nm /*책임자명_회원명*/ , ubpd.plan_presentn_sttus_cd /*제출상태*/ , case when ubpd.plan_presentn_sttus_cd is null then '미제출' else fn_cmm_get_code_nm('PLAN_PRESENTN_STTUS', ubpd.plan_presentn_sttus_cd) end as plan_presentn_sttus_nm /*제출상태명*/ , ubpd.bsns_plan_doc_id /*사업계획서ID*/ , ubpd.prsentr_attachment_group_id /*제출첨부파일그룹ID*/ , ubs.bsns_slctn_ID /** 사업선정대상ID */ , ubpat.apply_id /*신청ID*/ , (select member_nm from cmmt_member where member_id = ubpa.member_id ) as member_nm /*회원명(신청자명) */ , (select member_type from cmmt_member where member_id = ubpa.member_id ) as memberType /*회원명타입 */ from uspt_bsns ub /**사업*/ inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp /**사업공고*/ on ub.bsns_cd = ubp.bsns_cd /*사업코드*/ and ubp.enabled = true inner join uspt_bsns_job_step ubjs /*사업업무단계*/ on ubp.bsns_cd = ubjs.bsns_cd /*사업코드*/ and ubjs.job_step_cd ='AGREM' /*업무단계_협약*/ inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa /**사업공고신청자*/ on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpa.pblanc_id /*공공id*/ inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_apply_task ubpat /**사업공고 신청 과제*/ on ubpa.apply_id = ubpat.apply_id inner join uspt_last_slctn_trget ulst /**최종선정대상*/ on ubpa.apply_id = ulst.apply_id /*신청ID*/ and ulst.slctn = true inner join uspt_bsns_slctn ubs /**사업선정대상*/ on ulst.last_slctn_trget_id = ubs.last_slctn_trget_id /*최종선정대상ID*/ left outer join uspt_bsns_plan_doc ubpd /**사업계획서*/ on ubs.bsns_slctn_id = ubpd.bsns_slctn_id /*사업선정대상ID*/ left outer join uspt_task_rspnber utr /**과제책임자*/ on ubpd.bsns_plan_doc_id = utr.bsns_plan_doc_ID /*사업계획서ID*/ where 1=1
and ubpd.presentn_dt between to_date(#{presentnDtStart},'yyyymmdd') and to_date(#{presentnDtEnd},'yyyymmdd')
and ub.bsns_year = #{bsnsYear} /*사업년도*/
and ub.bsns_nm like concat('%', #{bsnsNm}, '%') /*사업명*/
and ubp.pblanc_nm like concat('%', #{pblancNm}, '%') /*공고명*/
and ubpd.bsns_plan_doc_id = #{bsnsPlanDocId} /*사업계획서ID*/
and ubpd.bsns_slctn_id = #{bsnsSlctnId} /** 사업선정대상ID */
) a where 1=1
and a.task_nm_ko like concat('%', #{taskNmKo}, '%') /*과제명*/
and a.member_nm like concat('%', #{memberNm}, '%') /*회원명*/
and (a.plan_presentn_sttus_cd ='PLPR01' or a.plan_presentn_sttus_cd is null)
and a.plan_presentn_sttus_cd = #{planPresentnSttusCd} /*제출상태*/
offset #{beginRowNum} -1 limit #{itemsPerPage}

/** UsptBsnsPlanDocDao.selectOne */ select bsns_plan_doc_id ,bsns_slctn_id ,task_nm_ko /*과제명*/ ,task_nm_en /*과제명_영문*/ ,apply_field /*지원분야*/ ,prsentr_id ,presentn_dt ,prsentr_attachment_group_id ,makeup_req_cn ,makeup_rqester_id ,makeup_req_dt ,makeup_req_file_group_id ,plan_presentn_sttus_cd ,partcptn_company_cnt ,smlpz_cnt ,mspz_cnt ,etc_cnt ,total_wct ,member_id ,creator_id ,created_dt ,updater_id ,updated_dt ,to_char(updated_dt,'yyyy-mm-dd mi:ss') as request_dt from uspt_bsns_plan_doc where 1=1 and bsns_plan_doc_id = #{bsnsPlanDocId}
and plan_presentn_sttus_cd = #{planPresentnSttusCd}

/** UsptBsnsPlanDocDao.selectBsnsPlanDocFileList */ select ca.attachment_id from ( select ubpd.prsentr_attachment_group_id /*제출첨부파일그룹ID*/ , ubpd.plan_presentn_sttus_cd /*제출상태*/ , (select member_nm from cmmt_member where member_id = ubpd.member_id) as member_nm /*회원명 */ from uspt_bsns ub /**사업*/ inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp /**사업공고*/ on ub.bsns_cd = ubp.bsns_cd /*사업코드*/ and ubp.enabled = true inner join uspt_bsns_job_step ubjs /*사업업무단계*/ on ubp.bsns_cd = ubjs.bsns_cd /*사업코드*/ and ubjs.job_step_cd ='AGREM' /*업무단계_협약*/ inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa /**사업공고신청자*/ on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpa.pblanc_id /*공공id*/ inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_apply_task ubpat /**사업공고 신청 과제*/ on ubpa.apply_id = ubpat.apply_id inner join uspt_last_slctn_trget ulst /**최종선정대상*/ on ubpa.apply_id = ulst.apply_id /*신청ID*/ and ulst.slctn = true inner join uspt_bsns_slctn ubs /**사업선정대상*/ on ulst.last_slctn_trget_id = ubs.last_slctn_trget_id /*최종선정대상ID*/ left outer join uspt_bsns_plan_doc ubpd /**사업계획서*/ on ubs.bsns_slctn_id = ubpd.bsns_slctn_id /*사업선정대상ID*/ left outer join uspt_task_rspnber utr /**과제책임자*/ on ubpd.bsns_plan_doc_id = utr.bsns_plan_doc_ID /*사업계획서ID*/ where 1=1
and ubpd.presentn_dt between to_date(#{presentnDtStart},'yyyymmdd') and to_date(#{presentnDtEnd},'yyyymmdd')
and ub.bsns_year = #{bsnsYear} /*사업년도*/
and ub.bsns_nm like concat('%', #{bsnsNm}, '%') /*사업명*/
and ubp.pblanc_nm like concat('%', #{pblancNm}, '%') /*공고명*/
and ( ubpat.task_nm_ko like concat('%', #{taskNmKo}, '%') or ubpd.task_nm_ko like concat('%', #{taskNmKo}, '%') ) /*과제명*/
and ubpd.bsns_plan_doc_id = #{bsnsPlanDocId} /*사업계획서ID*/
and ubpd.bsns_slctn_id = #{bsnsSlctnId} /** 사업선정대상ID */
) a inner join cmmt_attachment ca /*첨부파일*/ on a.prsentr_attachment_group_id = ca.attachment_group_id where 1=1
and a.member_nm like concat('%', #{memberNm}, '%') /*회원명*/
and (a.plan_presentn_sttus_cd ='PLPR01' or a.plan_presentn_sttus_cd is null)
and a.plan_presentn_sttus_cd = #{planPresentnSttusCd} /*제출상태*/
and prsentr_attachment_group_id is not null
